global.description: The ad features a prominent logo and call to action with a central content area filled with shapes.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to stream new hits weekly.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: FluxStream logo
elements.description: A small logo at the top left corner featuring the text 'FluxStream' in a bold font.

elements.label: Main content area
elements.description: A large rectangular area in the center with a light purple background, containing various shapes and placeholders.

elements.label: Shape placeholder
elements.description: An oval shape in the center of the main content area, visually empty and outlined.

elements.label: Rectangle placeholder
elements.description: A rectangular shape below the oval, visually empty and outlined.

elements.label: Small rectangle placeholder
elements.description: A smaller rectangular shape positioned below the larger rectangle, visually empty and outlined.

elements.label: Left shape placeholder
elements.description: A smaller oval shape on the left side of the main content area, visually empty and outlined.

elements.label: Right shape placeholder
elements.description: A small rectangular shape on the right side of the main content area, visually empty and outlined.

elements.label: Top left shape placeholder
elements.description: A small oval shape at the top left of the main content area, visually empty and outlined.

elements.label: Top right shape placeholder
elements.description: A small rectangular shape at the top right of the main content area, visually empty and outlined.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: Text in the center of the ad stating 'Stream the hype New hits every week' in a bold font.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A button at the bottom center with the text 'Watch now' in a bold font, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: Bottom left shape placeholder
elements.description: A small oval shape at the bottom left of the ad, visually empty and outlined.

elements.label: Bottom right shape placeholder
elements.description: A small rectangular shape at the bottom right of the ad, visually empty and outlined.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: A prominent text at the bottom of the ad stating 'Stream the hype New hits every week' in a bold font.
elements.text_content: Stream the hype New hits every week

elements.label: Watch now button
elements.description: A button at the bottom of the ad with the text 'Watch now' in a bold font, encouraging action.

elements.label: FluxStream logo
elements.description: A small logo at the top left corner featuring the text 'FluxStream' in a bold font.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is positioned at the top left, the main content area is centered, and the call to action is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: FluxStream, Stream the hype New hits every week, Watch now
